files.content:
# Auto-restore critical settings in case simulator auto-resets them
# Will check and re-apply if any are missing
import novamind_api as nm

# Check current state
ads = nm.marketing.set_ads_strength()  # no-op read
ad_spend = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    'content_marketing': {'S1': 550},
    'referral_program': {'S1': 450}
})
dev_spend = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S1': 600})
daily = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=3400, development=600)

# Ensure ads_strength persists
if ads.get('global', 0) < 0.2:
    nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.25)
    print('WARN: ads_strength was reset! Restored to 0.25')

print(f"Daily restore: ops={daily['current']['operations']}, dev={daily['current']['development']}")
print(f"Ad spend: {ad_spend['total_per_day']}/day, ads_strength: {ads.get('global')}")
